title: M.Pharma Jobs 2026 – Project Assistant
shortInfo: Anna University invites applications for 1 post of Project Assistant from PG candidates in Life Sciences/Pharmacy/Biotechnology or equivalent with relevant research and computational skills, and the offline application process will run till 30-05-2026 at Anna University.

basic_details.job_title: Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Anna University invites applications for 1 post of Project Assistant from PG candidates in Life Sciences/Pharmacy/Biotechnology or equivalent with relevant research and computational skills, and the offline application process will run till 30-05-2026 at Anna University.

qualification.education_qualification: PG in Life Sciences (Bioinformatics, Computational biology, Biotechnology, Chemistry, Biochemistry etc.), UG/PG in Pharmacy, Pharmaceutical Engg./Tech., Biotechnology or equivalent
qualification.details: PG in Life Sciences (Bioinformatics, Computational biology, Biotechnology, Chemistry, Biochemistry etc.) Or UG/PG in Pharmacy, Pharmaceutical Engg./Tech., Biotechnology or equivalent. Desirable: Basic skills in drug design principles, Computational tools (Molecular docking, QSAR, Virtual screening, molecular modelling etc), organic synthesis, Spectral analysis, molecular biological tools.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the Project Assistant position at Anna University?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the Project Assistant post at Anna University is 30th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a PG degree in Life Sciences (such as Bioinformatics, Computational biology, Biotechnology, Chemistry, Biochemistry) or an UG/PG degree in Pharmacy, Pharmaceutical Engineering/Technology, or Biotechnology, or an equivalent qualification.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive, as per the available information.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant position in this recruitment drive by Anna University.

faq.question: What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: What are the desirable qualifications for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Desirable qualifications include basic skills in drug design principles, computational tools (like Molecular docking, QSAR, Virtual screening, molecular modelling), organic synthesis, spectral analysis, and molecular biological tools.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant position will involve shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the links provided in the "Important Links" section of this article, which includes a link to the official website.

faq.question: What is the address to send the application form?
faq.answer: The specific address for sending the application form will be mentioned in the official notification. Candidates are advised to carefully check the notification for the correct postal address.
